ops.text:
PRE-REGISTERED PROTOCOL (E18)

Goal: fit a reliability model over repeated judge votes and identify strata (category × context-length band × repo) where judge disagreement concentrates. Deliver a ranked strata table + concrete row-id lists per problem stratum (feeds E19 prompt hardening, E20 label-noise cross-ref).

Inputs (read-only snapshot _base-20260719, APFS-cloned into E18 inputs/, chmod u+w on clones):
- feedback.db `triage` table = the vote store. UNIQUE(dedup_key, role, prompt_version). role='judge' rows are the repeated votes: same item (dedup_key) re-judged across prompt_versions 4/5/6, model held constant at opus. Repeat set = 1623 keys (413 judged 2x [v5,v6]; 1210 judged 3x [v4,v5,v6]). role='auditor' (373 keys, pv3) = secondary axis.
- shadow.db = E13's dual-shadow proposals (51 rows; gate_score + sentinel_prob = the two shadow scorers). cc-notes log_search "E13" returned empty — proposals live only in shadow.db. Linked as cross-ref, not a repeated-vote source (only 2 reactions).
- eval/probs = athome watcher prob cache (628 float preds, meta.auc=0.93) — model predictions, not repeated judge votes; used as context, not modeled.

Repeat-vote signal already confirmed (raw): is_steering flip 13.3% (2-vote) / 15.6% (3-vote); category flip 23.7% / 31.4%.

Strata dimensions:
- category: item's modal judge category (tie -> latest version v6); category-flip tracked separately.
- context-length band: quantile bands of judge-visible context size (context_json before+after+trigger chars).
- repo: normalized from feedback_events.origin_path (collapse conductor-workspaces-* -> bioqa, *-worktrees-* -> base repo).

Model: (a) 2PL/Rasch mixed logistic is_steering ~ C(prompt_version) + (1|item) for version drift + item random-effect variance; (b) Beta-Binomial empirical-Bayes per-item reliability giving per-item steer-probability + overdispersion = per-item sigma (Bradley-Terry-with-per-item-sigma analog). Per-item unreliability = normalized entropy of is_steering votes. INSTRUMENT AUDIT (per memory: evaluate the instrument): compute the binomial noise floor (expected entropy under pure sampling at item base rate) so strata disagreement is judged against the noise floor, not raw. Per-stratum standard stat: Fleiss kappa (3-vote subset) / Cohen kappa (2-vote v5-v6 subset).

Ranking: empirical-Bayes-shrunken per-stratum disagreement (shrink to global mean, guard small-n), with lift-over-baseline and n>=threshold.

Success criterion: (1) a per-item reliability model fit with reported noise floor; (2) a ranked strata table where top strata exceed the noise floor with n>=15; (3) row-id (dedup_key) lists per problem stratum written to out/ for E19/E20 handoff. Cap $3, aim $0 (pure compute, no LLM calls).

Env: workspace venv /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-steer-exp0 via uv run --no-sync (numpy 2.5.1/scipy 1.18/sklearn 1.9/pandas 3.0). No repo mutations; all outputs under ~/.cc-steer/experiments/E18-vote-reliability/out/.
